steps.t: Erchar and Herion were last seen riding out to the fields in the western part of Dor-en-Ernil. You should search for signs of a conflict.
The ground shows signs of a conflict between Gondorians and Corsairs. You should examine the prints at the edge of the battleground.
You should examine any prints you find in the dirt.
You should examine any prints you find in the dirt.
Erchar and his men must be hiding somewhere north-west of here in Dor-en-Ernil. You should search for Erchar's camp.
Erchar can be found in his encampment in the western end of Dor-en-Ernil. Talk to Erchar and bring news of his brother's plea for return.
Erchar's men can be found in Erchar's encampment. Challenge Gondorian soldiers to defend their homeland.
Erchar can be found at his encampment in the western end of Dor-en-Ernil. Speak with Erchar.
